title: -Contract Amendments: Contract No. 32000146 Vestis Services, LLC (formerly Aramark Uniform Services) for Uniforms and Laundering & Contract No. 32300013 Herc Rental Inc. for Rental Equipment and Products

sections.recommendation:
Ratify the action taken by the City Manager during the City Council recess to increase
Contract Nos. 32000146 and 32300013 by $500,000 each, for a not to exceed amount
of $1,517,000 for contract #32000146 and $1,235,000 for contract #32300013.
NEGATIVE EFFECT IF ACTION IS DELAYED UNTIL AFTER COUNCIL RECESS
A delay in action until after council recess could interrupt city services, delay invoice
payments and lead to an interruption in job duties and the safety of city personnel. These
two contracts are providing services to several city departments and the budget to pay
for these services will be coming from various department budgets.
sections.current_situation:
The City’s Contract No. 32000146 with Vestis Services, LLC (formerly Aramark Uniform
Services) provides uniforms and other products so city personnel can do their job duties
in a safe manner.
Contract No. 32300013 with Herc Rental Inc. provides rental trucks, equipment and
related services so City workers can carry out their job duties without delay in city
services.
sections.background:
The City of Berkeley’s rental uniform and laundry needs are relatively small for the uniform
and laundry industry. Pricing obtained by the City was higher than that of larger cities.
City of Berkeley identified the City of Fresno contract, which leveraged a much larger
workforce, but with similar uniform and laundry needs. The City of Fresno competed and
awarded a multi-year contract to Aramark in 2019. Fresno received strong pricing based
2180 Milvia Street, Berkeley, CA 94704 ● Tel: (510) 981-7000 ● TDD: (510) 981-6903 ● Fax: (510) 981-7099
E-Mail: manager@berkeleyca.gov Website: https://berkeleyca.gov/

Contract Amendments: Contract No. 32000146 CONSENT CALENDAR
Vestis Services, LLC (formerly Aramark Uniform
Services) for Uniforms and Laundering & Contract
No. 32300013 Herc Rental Inc. for Rental Equipment and Products JANUARY 21, 2025
on their account size. The City of Berkeley is able to obtain the same pricing of the larger
account by piggybacking on the City of Fresno contract. Vestis Services, LLC (formerly
Aramark Uniform Services) continues to attest to meeting the City of Berkeley’s
Sweatshop-Free ordinance. The city is satisfied with Vestis Services, LLC uniform,
product quality and services.
Herc Rentals Inc. is a premier, full-service equipment rental company providing
customers the equipment, services, and solutions they need to achieve optimal
performance safely, efficiently, and effectively. The city is piggybacking on an Omnia
Cooperative Agreement, that was fully solicitated in order to gain economy of scale.
Contract No. 2019000318 provides equipment rentals, related products and services for
some City departments. A pioneer of the equipment rental industry, Herc Rentals Inc.
continues to provide excellent services to the City.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
Aramark Uniform Services now Vestis Services, LLC is actively undertaking
environmental initiatives such as wastewater reduction and waste minimization e
sections.rationale:
Several city job classifications within the City of Berkeley require uniforms that meet
industry safety standards.
The rental of vehicles and equipment are needed to enable several city departments the
ability to provide services to the community.
sections.alternatives:
None
CONTACT PERSON
Henry Oyekanmi, Director, Finance, 510-981-7326

1: Resolution
Page 2

Internal
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
CONTRACT AMENDMENTS: CONTRACT NO. 32000146 VESTIS SERVICES, LLC
(FORMERLY ARAMARK UNIFORM SERVICES) FOR UNIFORMS AND LAUNDERING
& CONTACT NO. 32300013 HERC RENTAL INC. FOR RENTAL EQUIPMENT AND
PRODUCTS
WHEREAS, Vestis Services, LLC (formerly Aramark Uniform Services) is currently
contracted to provide uniforms, laundering services and mats; and
WHEREAS, Herc Rental Inc. is currently contracted to provide vehicles and equipment
as needed for Public Works, Parks and other city departments; and
WHEREAS, in 2024 the city was notified Aramark Uniform Services name changed to
Vestis Services, LLC; and
WHEREAS, both contracts have exceeded their respective not-to-exceed amounts and
these two contracts are providing services to several city departments and the budget to
pay for these services will be coming from various department budgets.
WHEREAS,
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
Council ratifies action taken by the City Manager to increase Contract No. 32000146 with
Vestis Services, LLC (formerly Aramark Uniform Services), and Contract No. 32300013
with Herc Rental Inc in the amounts of $500,000 for a not to exceed amount of $1,517,000
for contract #32000146 and $1,235,000 for contract #32300013.
